Class JamiiFileUtils

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.utils.JamiiFileUtils
@Component public class JamiiFileUtils extends Object
Utility class for file operations including compression and file type handling.

This class provides methods for compressing files into ZIP format, managing directories, and determining file extensions from content types.

  • Method Details

    • getFileExtension

      public static String getFileExtension(String ContentType)
      Gets the file extension for a given content type.
      Parameters:
      ContentType - the content type to look up
      Returns:
      the file extension, or empty string if not found

    • compress

      public void compress(String sourceFilePath, String zipOutputFilePath, String zipFileName) throws Exception
      Compresses a file into a ZIP archive.
      Parameters:
      sourceFilePath - the path of the source file to compress
      zipOutputFilePath - the directory where the ZIP file will be created
      zipFileName - the name of the ZIP file
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during compression

    • compress

      public void compress(String sourceFilePath, String zipOutputFilePath, String zipFileName, boolean addZipExtention) throws Exception
      Compresses a file into a ZIP archive with optional .zip extension.
      Parameters:
      sourceFilePath - the path of the source file to compress
      zipOutputFilePath - the directory where the ZIP file will be created
      zipFileName - the name of the ZIP file
      addZipExtention - whether to add .zip extension to the file name
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during compression

    • directoryExists

      public boolean directoryExists(String directory)
      Checks if a directory exists.
      Parameters:
      directory - the directory path to check
      Returns:
      true if the directory exists, false otherwise

    • createDirectory

      public void createDirectory(String directory) throws IOException
      Creates a directory.
      Parameters:
      directory - the directory path to create
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs during directory creation

    • delete

      public void delete(String filePath)
      Deletes a file.
      Parameters:
      filePath - the path of the file to delete
